production.domainStatus: Vercel reports everymealguide.com and www.everymealguide.com configured correctly for project dinner-compare.

gates.name: Local static site
gates.evidence: Static homepage, expanded generated money routes, public hubs, branded 404 page, stylesheet, JavaScript, sitemap and robots generation exist.

gates.name: Brand accountability
gates.evidence: BRAND_ACCOUNTABILITY.md, BRAND_SOURCE_LEDGER.json, BRAND_COVERAGE_ROADMAP.md, public /company-accountability/ and /latest-offer-checks/ pages, and audit:brands account for every company. Fresh N Lean is watchlist-only.

gates.name: SEO foundation
gates.evidence: Canonical URLs, sitemap generation, robots generation, llms.txt generation, schema graph, FAQ schema, SEO docs, internal comparison hub, and expanded high-intent best/vs/review coverage exist. robots.txt points at https://www.everymealguide.com/sitemap.xml.

gates.name: Affiliate structure
gates.evidence: /go/{brand}/ routes, affiliate set/clear helpers, disclosure, sponsored/nofollow CTAs, and launch control exist.

gates.name: Visual QA
gates.evidence: Visual QA checklist and report scaffold exist, but browser-led visual QA has not been run in this gate.

gates.name: Domain
gates.evidence: EveryMealGuide.com is purchased through Namecheap, attached to Vercel, and Vercel reports apex and www configured correctly.

gates.name: Public deployment
gates.evidence: Production Vercel deployment is ready and aliased to https://everymealguide.com and https://www.everymealguide.com.

gates.name: Google verification file
gates.evidence: googlea432a8df6c28372f.html exists locally and the live www path resolves to a 53-byte verification file after Vercel's trailing-slash redirect.

gates.name: Analytics
gates.evidence: Pageview, matcher, newsletter, partner-redirect, and affiliate-click event scaffolds exist with measurement launch control and analytics event contract, but no live analytics provider is connected.

gates.name: Search Console
gates.evidence: Domain and HTML verification file are ready. Search Console Verify and sitemap submission still need to be completed in the Google account UI.

gates.name: Affiliate approvals
gates.evidence: All affiliate program statuses remain pending/apply. Applications can now be submitted using the live domain.

gates.name: Real affiliate URLs
gates.evidence: Approved tracking URLs have not been added.

gates.name: Revenue proof
gates.evidence: Weekly growth report scaffold exists, but there is no live traffic, affiliate clicks, or merchant-side conversion data yet.

nextBestSequence: Click Verify in Google Search Console for https://www.everymealguide.com/
Connect analytics and confirm pageview plus affiliate_click events
Run browser visual QA on homepage, best page, deals page, vs page, review page, and country page
Apply to P0 affiliate programs now that the live domain exists
Add first approved affiliate URL and redeploy
Track first affiliate click and merchant-side result
